text: Oh, ball in! Nice and straight, and pretty simple. And Maxwell just playing across the line and losing his opta. Well done, and gone. Ball in straight. And gets in. That's what Stark can do, and he'll do it when you need him to. So important to have someone that can finish things off for you. God be in sight now. Onto his tongue, so full delivery. A Yorker from Mitchell Stark.
